home.description: Experience the ultimate watersports destination. Offering premium Kite, Wing, and Foil lessons, top-tier Duotone equipment rentals, and luxury accommodation in the heart of Urla.

login.title: Member Login
login.rightQuote: Join the leading watersports community in Urla. Access your progress, book sessions, and manage your membership with UKC.

errors.networkError: Could not reach server. Check your connection.
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

profile.title: Rider Profile
profile.subtitle: Help us find the right gear for you

address.title: Your Location
address.subtitle: Where should we ship your orders?

hints.currency: All prices and payments will be processed in this currency
hints.shipping: Your address will be used as the default delivery address for shop orders. You can always change it at checkout.

validation.passwordPattern: Need uppercase, lowercase, number & special char (@$!%*?&)
validation.ageTooYoung: Must be at least 10 years old

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait before trying again.
forgotPassword.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

sent.title: Check Your Email
sent.body: If an account exists with {{email}}, you will receive a reset link shortly.
sent.didntReceiveBody: Check your spam folder or verify you entered the correct address. The link expires in 1 hour.

success.title: Success!
success.body: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

invalid.title: Link Invalid
invalid.defaultBody: This password reset link has expired or is invalid.
invalid.expiry: Reset links expire after 1 hour for security reasons.

errors.invalidLink: Invalid password reset link. Please request a new one.
errors.expiredLink: This password reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.
errors.validateFailed: Unable to validate reset link. Please try again later.
errors.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
errors.resetGenericFailed: Unable to reset password. Please try again later.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.passwordMinValidation: Password must be at least 8 characters

submit.title: Submit a warranty claim
submit.subtitle: Tell us what happened. After submitting you will get a tracking link in your email — keep it safe, it stays active until our team closes your case.
submit.errorGeneric: Could not submit your claim. Please try again.
submit.privacy: Your photos and videos are stored privately and viewable only via your tracking link. They are permanently deleted from our servers when the claim is closed.
submit.heroBody: Open a service file for your Duotone gear. Manufacturing defects covered — our team has eyes on every claim within 48 hours.
submit.afterSubmit: You will receive a tracking link by email immediately. The link stays active until our team closes the case.
submit.promise: “Every product we put in your hands is built to withstand the elements. When something goes wrong, we make it right.”
submit.section1Caption: Tell us how to reach you. Updates go to your email; nothing else.
submit.section2Caption: Identify the gear. Serial numbers are usually on the bladder, board base, or kite plug.
submit.section3Caption: The story matters. When, how, what changed — more detail helps us decide faster.
submit.section4Caption: Photos of the issue, the serial plate, and any video that shows the defect in action.

process.submitBody: Tell us what happened. Attach photos & videos as evidence.
process.reviewBody: Our team confirms coverage and coordinates with the manufacturer.
process.resolveBody: Repair, replacement, or refund — tracked end-to-end on your private link.

fields.name: Full name
fields.issuePlaceholder: Tell us what happened, when it happened, and how the product is currently behaving.
fields.media: Photos and videos of the issue

track.notFound: This tracking link does not match an active claim. The case may have been closed or removed.
track.subtitle: Tracking code {{code}}
track.savedBody: We also emailed you the link. This page stays available until our team closes the claim.
track.noMessagesBody: When our team writes you, it shows up here and we send an email.
track.noActivityBody: Status changes, uploads, and other system events will appear here.
track.mediaEmpty: You did not attach any photos or videos.
track.mediaPurgedBody: Photos and videos are deleted once a claim is closed or rejected to protect your privacy.

staff.notFound: This staff link is either revoked or the case has been deleted. Ask the admin for a fresh link.
staff.subtitle: Case for {{customer}}
staff.statusNote: Optional note to attach with this status change
staff.noTransitions: No further status changes are available from this state.
staff.notePlaceholder: Write a note for the team or the customer…
staff.noteVisibleToCustomer: Make this note visible to the customer
staff.mediaHint: Attach photos, videos or a PDF — including the manufacturer Product Bill / proof of purchase. Documents are visible to the UKC team only, not the customer.

media.empty: No photos or videos uploaded yet.

uploader.cta: Click to add photos or videos
uploader.ctaDocs: Click to add photos, videos or a PDF bill
uploader.hint: JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC up to {{photo}} MB each · MP4, MOV, WEBM up to {{video}} MB each
uploader.hintDocs: PDF (e.g. the manufacturer Product Bill) up to {{doc}} MB each
uploader.cap: Max {{photos}} photos and {{videos}} videos · {{cap}} GB combined
uploader.capDocs: Max {{photos}} photos, {{videos}} videos and {{docs}} PDFs · {{cap}} GB combined
uploader.errorQuota: Total upload size would exceed {{cap}} GB.
